LAW AND MOTION, 302, JUDGE MILLER DISCLOSES THAT SHE KNOWS AND IS SOCIAL FRIENDS WITH DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY ELIZABETH SALVESON. JUDGE MILLER PRACTICED LAW IN THE SAME FIRM AS MS. SALVESON FROM DEC. 1981 THROUGH MARCH 1987, AND FROM 1992 THROUGH 1995. THIS WILL NOT AFFECT HER ABILITY TO BE FAIR AND IMPARTIAL IN THIS CASE. SHE DOES NOT BELIEVE THAT A PERSON AWARE OF THESE FACTS WOULD REASONABLY HAVE A DOUBT THAT SHE WILL BE ABLE TO BE IMPARTIAL. THE COURT GAVE COUNSEL THE OPPORTUNITY TO ASK QUESTION. NO QUESTIONS OR OBJECTIONS WERE RAISED. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185. SUBMITTED ON SEP-10-2013 BY MARLA J. MILLER. (302)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-23-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOHN HOUSTON SCOTT OF THE SCOTT LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 561-9601 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. LARRY HECIMOVICH, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-3933 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - Judge Miller discloses that she knows and is social friends with Deputy City Attorney Elizabeth Salveson. Judge Miller practiced law in the same firm as Ms. Salveson from Dec. 1981 through March 1987, and from 1992 through 1995. This will not affect her ability to be fair and impartial in this case. She does not believe that a person aware of these facts would reasonably have a doubt that she will be able to be impartial. The court gave counsel the opportunity to ask question. No questions or objections were raised. The matter was argued. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is taken under submission. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/mjm
